file_insights.changes: Added TRANSIENT_PATTERNS constant containing 11 network/transient failure indicators (rate limit, 429/503 errors, timeout, connection refused, ECONNRESET, EX_TEMPFAIL, name resolution, no route to host, 524)
file_insights.purpose: Enable bop retry-transient command to distinguish transient failures from permanent failures
file_insights.impact: low - single const definition, no behavioral changes yet

file_insights.changes: New 254-line specification for terminal card renderer with 5 capability levels, trait-based rendering architecture, and progressive degradation strategy
file_insights.purpose: Define rich ANSI terminal UI for bop status/list commands matching vibe-kanban quality with demoscene-inspired styling
file_insights.impact: high - defines entire new subsystem architecture

file_insights.changes: Reordered specs: 028 now wave 9 (before 027), updated 027 to wave 10, added wave 10 to target_waves loop
file_insights.purpose: Correct dependency order: renderer trait/TermCaps must exist before plan progress rendering uses them
file_insights.impact: medium - affects wave scheduling but maintains dependency correctness

patterns_discovered.description: 5-level terminal capability hierarchy (Dumb→Basic→Extended→Full→TrueColor) with graceful fallbacks and feature gating per level
CardRenderer trait enables swappable implementations per capability level without conditional logic in callers
patterns_discovered.code: pub trait CardRenderer { render_section_header, render_card_row, render_progress, render_footer }

patterns_discovered.description: TermCaps::detect() checks ZELLIJ env, COLORTERM, TERM variables in order of specificity to classify terminal class
Uses dithered fade headers (░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░) and dice glyphs (⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅) for priority encoding, matching classic BBS aesthetics
patterns_discovered.constraint: All glyphs BMP-safe (U+0000–U+FFFF); SMP glyphs only if glyph field + level ≥ Full

patterns_discovered.description: String pattern matching on failure output to separate network/timing issues from build/test failures

gotchas_discovered.issue: Terminal width must not be cached
gotchas_discovered.reason: bop status --watch (spec 025) requires dynamic resize handling; width queried on every render
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Caching would break responsive layout on terminal resize

gotchas_discovered.reason: Zellij always provides Full capability regardless of env vars
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Ensure ZELLIJ check runs first in detect_level()

gotchas_discovered.issue: SMP glyphs (playing cards U+1F0xx) require glyph field + level >= Full
gotchas_discovered.reason: Not all terminals support SMP; safe fallback uses BMP-only dice glyphs
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Renderer must check both glyph field presence AND capability level before using SMP

gotchas_discovered.reason: Below 100 chars, single-column with double box is more readable than cramped two-column
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Layout selection depends on TermCaps.two_column flag derived from width

gotchas_discovered.issue: RGB gradient progress bar only at TrueColor level
gotchas_discovered.reason: 256-color (Full) and below cannot express smooth amber→green gradient
gotchas_discovered.consequence: Full/Extended levels fallback to fixed amber block; gradient is TrueColor-only enhancement

gotchas_discovered.reason: Renderer trait takes flat CardView, does not read files; prevents renderer coupling to Meta format
gotchas_discovered.consequence: bop list/status commands must build CardView from Meta + optional AC plan before rendering

discoveries.outcome_summary: Subtask completed successfully. TRANSIENT_PATTERNS const defined with 11 network failure indicators. Comprehensive spec 028 created defining 5-level terminal renderer architecture with trait-based dispatch, demoscene styling, and graceful degradation. Dependency chain corrected: spec 028 (wave 9, core infrastructure) before spec 027 (wave 10, AC plan integration). All changes align with bop's VM-first, minimal-complexity architecture.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement modular render/ subdirectory structure (mod.rs, dumb.rs, basic.rs, extended.rs, full.rs, truecolor.rs) per spec architecture to keep renderer logic isolated and testable
recommendations.rationale: 5-level dispatch grows complex; separate files prevent single render file from becoming too large

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests for TermCaps::detect() across SSH, local, Zellij, and dumb terminal environments to validate capability hierarchy
recommendations.rationale: Terminal detection is environment-sensitive; regression risks silent fallback to degraded output

recommendations.recommendation: Validate BMP glyph restrictions across all 5 levels; audit dithering chars (░▒▓) and dice (⚀–⚅) for compatibility in real terminals (SSH, macOS Terminal, iTerm2, Zellij)
recommendations.rationale: Spec assumes BMP safety but real-world terminals vary; SMP fallback required for edge cases

recommendations.recommendation: Consider SIGWINCH-aware resize detection for bop status --watch, invalidating cached width on signal rather than polling every render
recommendations.rationale: Terminal re-query on every render is safe but inefficient; SIGWINCH handler balances responsiveness with CPU cost

recommendations.recommendation: Precompute section header fill (░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░) at render time using terminal_size crate, not at spec write time
recommendations.rationale: Spec shows static examples; actual fill width must adapt to terminal.width to avoid line wrapping

recommendations.recommendation: Document TRANSIENT_PATTERNS in crates/bop-cli/src/lib.rs or update bop-retry-transient spec when implemented to reference these patterns
recommendations.rationale: Const is defined but no code yet calls is_transient_failure(); documentation prevents orphaned const
